reviews.review_description:
I love spaceship and hovercraft type games.. i really like how the HOTAS controls are completely customizable in the aspect of they can be placed anywhere within the ship.. I actually swapped the throttle and stick, so that I could steer with my left hand. I'm right handed but virtually all games steer with the left hand, whether it's driving, walking, etc. So it's really cool that it didn't try to force me to steer with my right. There's a little bit of a learning curve but it flies like what you would expect a ship with a stick control to fly. I don't know if i just need more practice or if the time that they give you to beat the level is insufficient, but i've played the level like five times an I can't beat it yet..  regardless, i think it's a pretty awesome game!

I would give it 5 stars if it had more options available.. there's no training mode, there's only one ship and one difficulty.. so if you can't beat it, you can't read it .
